name: Sneha KaushalMobile: +91-7717623925

suggestions.text: Keep resume to 1-2 pages for best results
Tailor your resume for each job application

interview_questions.q: How does async/await work under the hood?
interview_questions.tip: Connect to Promises and the event loop

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between == and === in JavaScript?
interview_questions.tip: Type coercion vs strict equality

interview_questions.q: Explain the difference between lists, tuples, and sets in Python.
interview_questions.tip: Focus on mutability, ordering, and use-cases

interview_questions.q: Explain database normalization (1NF, 2NF, 3NF).
interview_questions.tip: Use a real table example to show each normal form

interview_questions.q: How do you handle tight deadlines and pressure?
interview_questions.tip: Give a real example, mention prioritization and communication

interview_questions.q: What is the Virtual DOM and why does React use it?
interview_questions.tip: Compare with real DOM manipulation performance

interview_questions.q: How does Python's memory management work?
interview_questions.tip: Talk about garbage collection and reference counting

interview_questions.q: Explain Java's garbage collection mechanism.
interview_questions.tip: Mention JVM, heap, generations, and GC algorithms

interview_questions.q: What is event delegation in JavaScript?
interview_questions.tip: Explain bubbling and how it improves performance

interview_questions.q: What are React Hooks and why were they introduced?
interview_questions.tip: Compare with class components, mention useState/useEffect

interview_questions.q: What is the GIL (Global Interpreter Lock) in Python?
interview_questions.tip: Mention threading limitations and multiprocessing as alternative

interview_questions.q: Explain REST API design principles.
interview_questions.tip: Stateless, resources as URLs, HTTP verbs, status codes

interview_questions.q: Explain OOP concepts (Inheritance, Polymorphism, Encapsulation, Abstraction).
interview_questions.tip: Give a real-world analogy for each — animal/dog for inheritance is classic

interview_questions.q: Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
interview_questions.tip: Align with the company's growth — mention skills you want to develop

interview_questions.q: How do you stay updated with new technologies?
interview_questions.tip: Mention specific sources: blogs, GitHub, courses, side projects

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between Abstract class and Interface in Java?
interview_questions.tip: Mention multiple inheritance, default methods in Java 8+

interview_questions.q: Describe your experience working in a team.
interview_questions.tip: Mention collaboration tools, conflict resolution, code reviews

interview_questions.q: What is Context API and when would you use it over Redux?
interview_questions.tip: Talk about prop drilling problem and scale

interview_questions.q: Describe a challenging project you worked on and how you overcame the difficulties.
interview_questions.tip: Use STAR method: Situation, Task, Action, Result

interview_questions.q: How do you optimize performance in a React application?
interview_questions.tip: Mention useMemo, useCallback, lazy loading, React.memo

interview_questions.q: Explain multithreading in Java with synchronized keyword.
interview_questions.tip: Cover race conditions, deadlock, and thread safety

interview_questions.q: What is a stored procedure and when would you use one?
interview_questions.tip: Compare with regular queries, mention security and reuse

interview_questions.q: What are Python decorators and how do you use them?
interview_questions.tip: Explain with a real example like @login_required or @staticmethod

interview_questions.q: What is the difference between INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, and RIGHT JOIN?
interview_questions.tip: Draw a Venn diagram mentally and explain with example tables

interview_questions.q: What are list comprehensions and when should you use them?
interview_questions.tip: Show syntax and compare with regular for-loop

text:
Sneha KaushalMobile: +91-7717623925
kaushalsneha36@gmail.com github.com/snehakaushal
linkedin.com/in/snehakaushal-4a1720290
PROFILE
Motivated and detail-oriented Computer Science student with a strong focus onData Structures and
Algorithms (DSA)and problem-solving, supported by solid proficiency inJava. Experienced in backend and
full-stack development with a strong understanding ofObject-Oriented Programming (OOP),DBMS, and
SQL, along with foundational knowledge of cloud computing and cybersecurity. Passionate about continuous
learning and building efficient, real-world solutions.
EDUCATION
•Chitkara University, Punjab, India
B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering 2023 – 2027
•DAV Public School, Mehtapur, Himachal Pradesh
Class XII 2023
•Bhavan SL Public School, Amritsar, Punjab
Class X 2021
SKILLS
•Programming Languages: Java, JavaScript,SQL
•Web Technologies:HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, React
•Core Concepts: DSA,OOP,DBMS,Operating Systems,Computer Networks, Cloud Computing
•Tools & Frameworks:Git, GitHub, VS Code, Spring Boot, Maven, AWS, CyberChef
PROJECTS
•Smart Attendance & Performance Analyzer (Python)
Built a CLI-based application usingPythonto analyze attendance and performance data using CSV files,
dictionaries, sorting, and modular design; includes manual data entry and GitHub version control.
•E-Commerce Website — Java, Spring Boot, Maven
Developed a full-stack e-commerce platform usingJavawith secure user authentication, product management,
and backend integration.
•Fitness Tracking Application — React, Java
Created a fitness tracking web application with user management and progress visualization using React
frontend andJavabackend services.
•IoT-Based Tiffin Heating System
Designed an IoT-based solution to automate temperature control using sensors and embedded automation logic.
CERTIFICATIONS
•Java (Basic) Certification– HackerRank
•Certification – GeeksforGeeks
•Introductory C Programming – Coursera
•SQL (Basic) Certification– HackerRank
•Building Cloud Computing Solutions at Scale – Coursera
•Azure Cloud Fundamentals – iPro COE
•-900T00-A: Introduction to Cloud Infrastructure – Microsoft
•-900T00-A: Introduction to Microsoft Security, Compliance & Identity – Microsoft
STRENGTHS
•Goal-and Growth-Oriented•Resilient•Persistent•Passionate Learner
